rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully achieved all four verification conditions. Tool outputs in the agent log confirm: (1) cluster health is green with 5 nodes (_cluster/health output); (2) all 4 app-data shards (2 primary, 2 replica) are on es-data-0 and es-data-1, not the original 3 nodes (_cat/shards output); (3) original nodes have zone=primary, new nodes have zone=secondary (_cat/nodeattrs output); (4) the original es StatefulSet remains at 3/3 replicas while the new es-data StatefulSet holds 2/2 (kubectl get statefulset output). The stage oracle verdict is pass. The stage_01 regression is expected — the deploy-core-cluster oracle checks for exactly 3 nodes, and adding 2 more necessarily breaks that check; this is an artifact of cumulative state in a workflow, not a fault of this stage's work. No operators or CRDs were installed.
